proposals.proposed_value: Consult a physician. Show this safety data sheet to the doctor in attendance.Move out of dangerous area.
proposals.source_excerpt:
General advice
Consult a physician. Show this safety data sheet to the doctor in attendance.Move out of dangerous area.
proposals.rationale: General first-aid advice applicable across all exposure routes, not specific to one route.

proposals.proposed_value: If breathed in, move person into fresh air. If not breathing, give artificial respiration. Consult a physician.
proposals.source_excerpt:
If inhaled
If breathed in, move person into fresh air. If not breathing, give artificial respiration. Consult a physician.
proposals.rationale: First-aid instructions specific to inhalation exposure.

proposals.proposed_value: Wash off with soap and plenty of water. Consult a physician.
proposals.source_excerpt:
In case of skin contact
Wash off with soap and plenty of water. Consult a physician.
proposals.rationale: First-aid instructions specific to skin contact exposure.

proposals.proposed_value: Rinse thoroughly with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes and consult a physician.
proposals.source_excerpt:
In case of eye contact
Rinse thoroughly with plenty of water for at least 15 minutes and consult a physician.
proposals.rationale: First-aid instructions specific to eye contact exposure.

proposals.proposed_value: Do NOT induce vomiting. Never give anything by mouth to an unconscious person. Rinse mouth with water. Consult a physician.
proposals.source_excerpt:
If swallowed
Do NOT induce vomiting. Never give anything by mouth to an unconscious person. Rinse mouth with water. Consult a physician.
proposals.rationale: First-aid instructions specific to ingestion exposure.
